title: PolicyMesh Capability Manifest
description: Machine-readable declaration of what a PolicyMesh node supports. Used by peers, federation pilots, and operators to make programmatic compatibility decisions.

schema_version.description: Version of the capability manifest schema itself.

node_id.description: Stable human-readable identifier for the node, e.g. a hostname or org-scoped name.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which this manifest was generated.

storage_mode.description: Active storage backend for this node.

reconciliation_mode.description: Pull reconciliation strategy in effect. 'lineage_aware' is the recommended production posture.

transparency_features.description: Transparency capability tokens active on this node, e.g. 'http_publish', 'signed_checkpoint', 'peer_compare'.

stable_features.description: Capability tokens for features on the stable, production-supported surface.

experimental_features.description: Capability tokens for experimental surfaces that may change without notice.

federation_pilot.description: Whether this node has accepted the operator acceptance criteria for small-federation pilots.

operator_notes.description: Free-text notes for human readers. Not parsed by consumers.

extensions.description: Vendor or deployment-specific metadata. Contents are not validated by this schema.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical manifest body (all fields except manifest_hash itself, JSON-serialised with sorted keys and no whitespace). Used for integrity verification.
